itinerary.title: Pickup & Travel to Barkot
itinerary.description: Pickup from Kotdwar, Dehradun or Delhi and drive to Barkot. Check in at hotel and rest for the spiritual journey ahead.

itinerary.title: Yamunotri Darshan
itinerary.description: Early morning trek to Yamunotri Temple (6 km). Perform puja and take a dip in the holy hot springs. Return to Barkot for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Travel to Uttarkashi
itinerary.description: Drive from Barkot to Uttarkashi via scenic Himalayan roads. Visit Vishwanath Temple in Uttarkashi. Overnight at hotel.

itinerary.title: Gangotri & Kedarnath
itinerary.description: Day 4: Drive to Gangotri for darshan. Day 5: Drive to Guptkashi. Day 6: Helicopter or trek to Kedarnath Temple for darshan and blessings.

itinerary.title: Badrinath & Mana Village
itinerary.description: Day 7: Drive towards Badrinath. Day 8: Temple darshan and visit Mana Village — the last Indian village before Tibet. Day 9: Begin return journey.

itinerary.title: Return Journey
itinerary.description: Drive back to your starting point (Delhi/Dehradun/Kotdwar) with memories of a lifetime. Approximate arrival by evening.
